schema.description: Describes the request body of the /deletemembership API call

version.description: Version number for document for optimistic concurrency control. If absent or 0 then no version checks are done.

datasource.description: The datasource for which the membership is removed

membership.description: the name of the membership to be deleted

groupName.description: The group for which the membership is specified

memberUserId.description: If the member is a user, then the email or datasource id for the user

memberGroupName.description: If the member is a group, then the name of the member group

membership.title: DatasourceMembershipDefinition

schema.title: DeleteMembershipRequest
